ORD confirmed as Chicago O'Hare International Airport, United Airlines primary Midwest hub with ~4,700 flight attendants based there

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic benchmark task running in an Android AVD emulator (Gym-Anything framework). The airport code ORD refers to Chicago O'Hare International Airport, verified as United Airlines' primary hub and headquarters location. The persona of a United Airlines Captain based at ORD is plausible given that ORD is one of United's largest crew bases. However, the specific personnel (Capt. Rodriguez and the three friends with @united.aero addresses) are synthetic test identities created for this task. Flight Crew View (com.robert.fcView) is a real third-party app for flight crew, though current public information indicates it does not officially support United Airlines (only other carriers like Delta, JetBlue, etc.), which may reflect the synthetic nature of this test environment.
